data.title: Tropez Residences @ Tropicana Danga Bay,Johor Bahru, Johor
data.description:
Description:
Looking for a quiet, clean, and secure living environment? We have 2 brand new, newly renovated Standard Rooms available for rent! Specially reserved for working professionals who appreciate a quality and peaceful lifestyle.
✨ Tenant Requirements:
Single Occupancy Only: Strictly for 1 person per room (No couples/pairs to ensure a peaceful and uncrowded environment).
Professionals Only: Standard 9-to-5 day shift workers preferred (Strictly no night shift workers).
Strictly Non-Smoking: No smoking allowed inside the unit 🚭
No Pets Allowed 🐾
No Overnight Guests: For the privacy and security of all housemates.
Looking for: Clean, responsible housemates with regular sleeping habits who respect each other's space.
🌟 About the Room & Unit:
Brand New Renovation: The unit has just been fully renovated. All furniture, fixtures, and appliances are brand new, clean, and tidy!
Prime Location: Located at Tropez Residences, Danga Bay. Only around a 10-minute drive to Johor Bahru CIQ / Singapore Checkpoint, perfect for daily commuters to Singapore!
All-Inclusive Rent: Rent covers high-speed Wi-Fi, electricity, water, and Air Conditioning (A/C).
Fully Equipped Appliances: Washing machine, Clothes Dryer, and refrigerator are provided.
Note: There are no kitchen facilities/stove available, so cooking is not permitted.
Bonus Perk: Free regular cleaning service for the common areas to keep the place spotless and hassle-free for you!
📍 Convenient Neighborhood & Amenities:
Grocery store/convenience shop located right downstairs at the condo lobby.
Walking distance to a nearby Mamak stall—super convenient for quick meals.
🏊‍♂️ Premium Condo Facilities:
24-hour strict security with a full access card system.
Infinity swimming pool, fully equipped gymnasium, and sky garden.
💰 Rental & Deposit Terms:
Deposit: 2 months security deposit + 1 month advance rental (2 + 1)
No Agent Fee! (Deal directly with the owner)
Move-in Date: Immediate / [Insert Month]
📩 Interested? Please send me a direct message (DM) with a short introduction about yourself (your occupation/industry and your intended move-in date) to arrange a viewing!
